patch.value: Bug: computeWeekRange returns null both for items with NO dates and for items whose dates fall entirely OUTSIDE the chart window; both render as the same dot-dot 'undated' glyph, which misleads users. Fix: classify each row as undated vs off-window-earlier vs off-window-later, and render off-window with a directional hint (arrow left=earlier, right=later) while keeping genuinely undated as dot-dot. Mermaid uses real dates so it is unaffected.
Distinguish off-window items from genuinely undated items in ASCII/HTML
